recent_done_items: v0.13.1 (telemetry wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC2 (memory_index 활용도) close-out — Quality Dashboard Panel 3 의 `retrieval_hit_rate` placeholder (`pending_phase_13_ac2_telemetry`) → 실측값 전환. **3 deliverable**: (1) Telemetry sidecar 인프라 — `MemoryIndexTelemetryEvent` + `MemoryIndexTelemetrySummary` 2 schema + `append_telemetry_event` (in-process lock + open('a') + flush) + `summarize_telemetry` (JSONL parse + malformed skip + error-flag skip) + `read_telemetry_events` 6 helper (state/memory_index.py); (2) 3 skill + dispatcher 자동 wiring (4 source × 4 path = 12 emit point, output schema 변경 ❌ sidecar 만); (3) Dashboard Panel 3 placeholder → 실측값 + by_source 분해 표시. **신규 subcommand**: `memory-index-telemetry` (subcommand 36, read-only) + `--json` / `--show-events` flag. **신규 smoke**: `check_memory_index_telemetry.py` 6/6 PASS (1 emit / 2-hit-1-miss / by_source / malformed skip / graceful empty / concurrent append 10 line 보존). **housekeeping**: samples 24 file tool_version v0.11.20-beta → v0.13.1-beta + schemas regen 23 family 120,079 bytes + dashboard HTML regen + pyproject 0.13.1 + __init__.py loud fallback v0.13.1-beta + README header sync + maturity_matrix v0.13.0+v0.13.1 2줄 + memory_index/telemetry/.gitkeep. **검증**: drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error (8 pre-existing in state/memory_index.py + state/builder.py 정공법 유지) + 3 skill smoke 3/3 + quality dashboard 10/10 + memory_index 25/25 + output samples/schema validation 3/3 + memory freeze lint PASS. **누적 smoke 211+ PASS** (v0.13.0 200+ + 신규 6 + 회귀 5+). **산출물**: 3 신규 (smoke + .gitkeep + release note) + 12 수정 (2 schema/state + 3 skill + dispatcher + dashboard + pyproject + __init__ + README + maturity + memory_index README) + 5 housekeeping (samples 24 + schemas 2 + dashboard HTML + snapshot.md). breaking change: ❌. **AC2 close**: phase-13-definition-north-star.md 의 AC2 status 🟡 → ✅. tag push + gh release create: 예정.

2026-07-09 (audit-follow-up): 2026-07-09 audit-session 의 고도화 후보 10건 일괄 해소 (no release, no version bump). **P0 (즉시 가치, 3건)**: (1) project_status_assessment.md §2 자가진단 매트릭스 11항목 점수 채움 (합계 26/33, 78.8%, 7×3점 + 3×2점 + 1×1점); (2) PROJECT_PROFILE.md self-dogfood profile §1/§3/§4/§5/§6 작성 (152 line, 6 section); (3) memory_index/ 디렉토리 실재성 보강 — README 82 line + 7 seed entry (MEM-2026-07-09-001~007) + retrieval 동작 검증 (validation 0 issue, cue anchor 매칭 정상). **P1 (운영 지능화 심화, 3건)**: (4) adr-006-retrospective-2026.md early observation 109 line 작성 (full review scheduled 2026-07-16, 채택 후 30일); (5) Beta MCP 4종 (git_history_summarizer / smart_context_reader / workflow_log_rotator / apply_robust_patch) stable 승격 로드맵 — mcp-beta-promotion-roadmap-2026.md 135 line + maturity_matrix.mcp_tools.<tool>.{promotion_target,promotion_batch,stable_acceptance_status} 필드 추가 (1st batch v0.11.26 / 2nd batch v0.11.28), drift prevention smoke 6/6 PASS 유지; (6) Drift prevention 91 cycle 사례 5 category (A~E) 분류 — drift-prevention-91-cycle-classification-2026.md 215 line, 영향받은 13 file list (4633d34 commit 기준), 현 drift prevention guard 의 한계 + 확장 hook 5 후보. **P2 (Phase 13 후보, 4건)**: (7) Phase 13 정의 — north-star metric = silent_failing_cycles_count (운영 지능화 1차 추천), AC 3+1 + 검증 helper 4종 (phase-13-definition-north-star.md 141 line); (8) Wiki↔Memory 양방향 link 자동화 설계 — R-A 단방향 sync + R-B 역방향 lookup + R-C audit 3 단계 (wiki-memory-bidirectional-link-design.md 135 line, mentioned_in field 의 anchor 역할); (9) Quality dashboard 구현 가이드 — 5 panel (drift prevention / maturity distribution / memory_index utilization / smoke trend / recent release) + 구현 청사진 (quality-dashboard-implementation-guide.md 174 line); (10) automated-repro-scaffold AI 에이전트 연동 강화 — 5 한계 식별 + R-1 입력 option 확장 (existing_test_code / project_profile) + R-2~R-4 (notes_structured / memory_index wiring / contract v1 fan-out) (automated-repro-scaffold-ai-integration.md 163 line). **검증**: drift prevention smoke 6/6 PASS + memory_index validation 0 issue + maturity_matrix schema v1 정합 + memory_index retrieval 동작 (cue anchor 매칭 정상). **도구 제약 관측**: 본 세션은 MiniMax-M3 model (model_provider=minimax) 환경으로 표준 Codex CLI 의 create_file / edit_file / apply_patch tool 미노출. exec_command + heredoc + Python helper (save_memory_entry 등) 으로 우회. 표준 codex-cli 0.143.0 은 PATH 에 있으나 model_provider 차이로 미동작. ADR-003 read-only 정책과 정합. **산출물**: 4 file edit (project_status_assessment.md / PROJECT_PROFILE.md / maturity_matrix.json / memory_index/README.md 포함) + 7 신규 file (adr-006 retrospective / mcp roadmap / drift 91 / phase 13 / bidir link / dashboard / repro-scaffold AI) + 7 memory_index entry JSON. breaking change: ❌.
